sla: 99% of workspace creation requests shall complete within 3 s; 100% within 5 s. Measured from HTTP POST to ready-to-upload state.
source: Parent user story NFR - 'Full workbench open-and-review cycle shall not require more than two working days'; Tier-1 interactive user journey.

feature: Evidence upload throughput (100 MB pack, Step 2)
sla: 95% of evidence uploads of packs ≤100 MB shall complete within 30 s under OFFICIAL classification, measured from HTTP POST to artefact detector ready. Per-MB throughput: 3–5 MB/s average, p95.
source: Parent user story NFR - 'Clause-coverage matrix available within 10 minutes of submission upload'; evidenced by per-MB throughput calculation.

feature: Coverage matrix generation (Step 2 continuation, 100 MB typical pack)
sla: 95% of clause-coverage matrix generations for typical 100 MB evidence packs shall complete within 10 minutes (600 s) of upload completion, measured from artefact detector ready to matrix PDF download available. 99% within 12 minutes.
source: Parent user story NFR - 'Clause-coverage matrix available within 10 minutes of submission upload'; end-to-end budget includes large batch ML inference.

sla: 99% of Readiness Dashboard renders shall complete within 5 s of upload completion signal, measured from request to interactive page ready.
source: Derived from parent NFR and typical web UI interactivity standards for operator-facing dashboards.

sla: 95% of Readiness Checks shall complete within 60 s, measured from user 'check' action to pass/fail verdict and list of blocking issues returned.
source: Parent user story implied SLA; gates the submission workflow.

sla: 99% of case-open operations shall complete within 10 s, measured from regulator's case-selection click to interactive case panel fully rendered.
source: Panel-facing interactive path; tight budget to minimize regulator waiting time.

sla: 95% of AI-assisted narrative flag renders shall complete within 30 minutes (1800 s) of case panel opening, measured from narrative inference trigger to readable flag explanations available for each evidence section.
source: Parent user story NFR - 'AI-assisted narrative flags within 30 minutes'; one-shot batch inference path.

sla: 99% of page/section navigation requests within case review shall render within 2 s, measured from user click to new evidence section visible.
source: Regulator panel workflow interactivity; tighter budget for cached, non-AI navigation.

sla: 95% of panel-action (review comment, flag, decision state change) writes shall complete within 500 ms, measured from user submit to immutable audit record confirmed in distributed log.
source: Regulatory audit and forensic traceability requirement; tight SLA for transactional write.

sla: 95% of decision record PDF exports shall complete within 5 minutes (300 s), measured from user 'export' action to downloadable file ready.
source: End-of-workflow export; moderate budget for one-shot, non-critical path.

sla: 99% of geofence-breach events shall result in containment action (command queued to avionics) within 500 ms (hard deadline 1 s). Measured from breach detection to control signal dispatch.
source: Parent NFR REQ005; safety-critical containment loop.

sla: 99% of cooperative DAA encounters shall be resolved (maneuver command issued or non-interference confirmed) within 5 s of first detection. Non-cooperative: within 30 s per DO-365 scenario profile. Hard deadline 60 s.
source: Parent NFR REQ007; DO-365 compliance for autonomous systems.

sla: 95% of C2 round-trip commands shall exhibit latency ≤1 s (tactical), p99 ≤2 s. Measured from operator input to aircraft acknowledgment received.
source: Vibe Requirements - C2 link latency (MeaningfulHumanControl) Tolerable <1 s.

sla: 95% of swarm consensus cycles (collision avoidance, formation coordination) shall complete within 200 ms of most-recent sensor update from any aircraft, measured at swarm decision heartbeat frequency.
source: Derived from Parent NFR REQ008 (Swarm Decision-Making); control loop alignment.

feature: Onboard ML inference for autonomy decisions
sla: 95% of onboard ML inference for tactical decisions (e.g., next-waypoint selection, DAA evasion maneuver) shall complete within 200 ms, p99 within 400 ms.
source: Parent NFR REQ009 (ML Assurance Case); airborne autonomy constraint.

feature: Flight termination command to motor cutoff
sla: 100% of flight termination commands shall result in motor shutdown within 500 ms (hard deadline), measured from command issuance at operator or autonomous trigger to propeller stop.
source: Parent NFR REQ011 (Flight Termination); safety-critical hard real-time deadline.

feature: Evidence search across classification boundary (10-year archive)
sla: 95% of evidence archive searches (by keyword, regulation clause, aircraft ID, date range) shall return results within 5 s for queries spanning up to 10 years of prior trial records, measured from user query submit to result list rendered.
source: Derived from workbench archive use-cases; moderate priority for non-critical regulatory queries.

feature: Coverage matrix generation for 500 MB evidence pack (worst case)
sla: 95% of coverage matrix generations for large 500 MB evidence packs shall complete within 20 minutes (1200 s), p99 within 30 minutes.
source: Worst-case scenario; may require horizontal scaling of inference tier.

feature: Panel action log write under high contention (10 simultaneous reviewers)
sla: 95% of action log writes during peak panel review (10+ concurrent reviewers) shall complete within 1 s (elevated p95 due to lock contention), p99 within 2 s.
source: Derived from panel review concurrency model; stress-tested scenario.

feature: Loss-of-C2 link detection and autonomous survival activation
sla: 100% of C2 link loss shall be detected and autonomous survival behavior initiated within 1 s of link loss onset, measured from last valid uplink command to first autonomous flight control input.
source: Vibe Requirements - C2 link latency (C2LinkResilience) and REQ006; safety-critical failsafe.
